name: Fitted Fairways
about: Fitted Fairways is a PGA indoor golf facility with locations in St. Simons Island, Georgia and Jacksonville, Florida. It offers a comprehensive suite of golf improvement services, including custom club fittings, professional lessons, and state-of-the-art simulator training and play. The facility uses innovative technology to provide detailed practice sessions, AI-driven lessons, and data-driven club fittings in a climate-controlled environment. Pricing is built around three pillars: simulator time, professional services, and memberships. Simulator bays are available by the half hour or hour at flat posted rates, with add-ons for extra players, rental clubs, and premium balls. Professional services like club fittings and lessons are priced per session, with memberships offering predictable monthly costs for frequent players.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level technology and launch monitors for highly accurate simulation and fitting
Data-driven approach with over 1,500 virtual courses for realistic play and performance feedback
Comprehensive services from club fittings and lessons to simulator bay rentals in one location

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site kitchen or food service mentioned
No bar or alcohol service mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading launch monitor mentioned as providing tour-level precision

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental clubs are available for an extra fee. The facility encourages members to practice with the same clubs they were fit in.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For players around a 10 handicap, 18 holes take approximately 45 minutes for a single, 1 hour 30 minutes for a twosome, 2 hours for a threesome, and 2 hours 30 minutes for a foursome.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information is provided about junior programs or child-friendly amenities.
